description: Provider-agnostic Local-8B floor scenarios for the Matrix Agent Harness. These are no-browser synthetic user episodes with real backend execution. They cover direct routing, skill injection, memory, tools, retrieval/KG boundaries, semantic lookup and subagent/delegation policy.

turns.user: Reply with exactly this marker in one short sentence: local_8b_floor_direct_ok.

metadata.focus: Small local target model can follow a direct no-tool contract through the normal agent runner.

turns.user: Assess this portfolio risk in one short sentence and include marker risk_floor_ack: BTC 80%, ETH 20%.

metadata.focus: Skill finder/injection is part of the Agent Harness even when tools are disabled.

turns.user: Use memory_add now to remember this exact local model floor note: bonsai_floor_memory_prefers_source_backed_recall.
Use memory_search now to recall bonsai_floor_memory_prefers_source_backed_recall and answer with the exact note.

metadata.focus: Explicit long-term memory add/search must work for the local 8B target model without relying on frontend interaction.

turns.user: Use get_chart_state now, then summarize the active symbol and timeframe in one short sentence.

metadata.focus: Tool execution and downstream Agent Chat SSE/tool-output rendering evidence.

turns.user: Use retrieve_context for source-grounded context about how EU sanctions can affect Russian oil shipping finance. Do not store this as personal memory.

metadata.focus: RAG/KG/world-context path must stay separate from personal memory.

turns.user: Use semantic_lookup to ground the term Sharpe ratio, then define it in one sentence.

metadata.focus: Semantic/metric grounding is part of retrieval-adjacent Agent Harness behavior.

turns.user: Do not delegate. Explain in one short sentence why a child agent cannot write shared memory in this harness, and include marker subagent_floor_ack.

metadata.focus: Subagent policy remains fail-closed and parent-owned while real delegation is product-deferred.
